trans-unit.source: Failed to load notifications. Please try again later.
Active sessions could not be loaded.
The session could not be revoked.
The other sessions could not be revoked.
Revoke every active session except the current one?
Trusted devices could not be loaded.
The trusted device could not be revoked.
Trusted devices could not be revoked.
All devices will require MFA verification again.
We couldn't upload your picture. Please try again.
Shown next to your name across the app.
JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF — 5 MB max.
Keep your account secure with a strong, unique password.
Changing your password signs out all your other sessions.
We couldn't verify your current password. Please check it and try again.
Enter your current password and we'll send a one-time code to your email address.
The verification code is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
We sent a 6-digit code to . Enter it below with your new password.
At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a special character.
Your password has been changed. For your security, all your sessions have been signed out — you'll need to sign in again with your new password.
We couldn't save your profile. Please try again.
This is the name that will be visible to everyone.
Your username and email are managed by your identity provider.
Your username and email address cannot be changed here.
Manage how your profile appears to other members.
Manage how your profile appears to other members.
Review your active sessions and the devices you trust.
Account and organization activity in one place.
{VAR_PLURAL, plural, =1 {1 notification across your account.} other {# notifications across your account.}}
Account and organization activity will show up here.
Review and revoke access to your account.
There are no other active sessions on your account.
Devices allowed to bypass repeated MFA verification.
Devices you mark as trusted during sign-in will appear here.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email or generated by your authenticator app.
Enter your email address below, and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
Remember your password? Back to login
Please sign in to your account to continue.
Please enter the verification code from your authenticator app or email.
Please enter a new password for your account. Make sure to choose a strong password that you haven't used before.
Please enter the verification code sent to your email to proceed with resetting your password.
You do not have permission to access this resource.
The page you are looking for does not exist.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
Manage your organizations and single sign-on settings.
Browse your organizations and open their facilities, equipment and inspections.
Update your profile, review sessions and security, and tune notifications.
We're performing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience. Please check back in a few moments.
Register your first fire safety equipment (extinguisher, detector…).
Add the locations to monitor. You can create up to 5 at once.
Set up the basic information for your fire safety company.
Invite your first team members to start collaborating.
An invitation has been sent to .
Record the first fire safety equipment inspection.
Complete your profile to get started.
Your onboarding is currently blocked. Please fix the issues and try again.
Site, building or area to monitor
Extinguisher, detector or other fire safety equipment
Create or refresh an equipment before running the first inspection.
Name must be at least 2 characters.
Name must be less than 120 characters.
Plan limit reached — upgrade to add more
A name of at least 2 characters is required.
Lines are immutable after the checklist is created.
The checklist is ready for inspections.
Archive ""? It will no longer be available for new inspections.
Checklists are the reusable inspection templates your teams run on site.
File name, MIME type and Base64 content are required.
Type must be at least 2 characters.
Type must be less than 255 characters.
This equipment will be marked as permanently out of service.
Files linked to this equipment will appear here.
Lifecycle maintenance events will appear here.
Adjust your search or filters, or register the assets you track.
No equipment assigned to this facility.
No equipment assigned to this facility.
Name must be at least 2 characters.
Name must be less than 255 characters.
Select a new parent facility or choose "None" to move this facility to the root level.
Adjust your search or filters, or register equipment for this facility.
Adjust your search or filters, or record an inspection for this facility.
Facilities are the sites and buildings your inspections cover.
Name must be at least 2 characters.
Name must be less than 255 characters.
A description of at least 3 characters is required.
The inspection has been created successfully.
Cancel this draft inspection? This action cannot be undone.
Adjust your search or filters, or record a new inspection.
No findings have been reported for this inspection.
Synchronize field changes before installing the new version.
A new version is ready. Reload now?
All prepared work items are complete or skipped.
Hand the intervention to a manager once every field work item is resolved.
Add at least one work item
Connect to the network before publishing this intervention.
Updates applied atomically when the intervention is published.
Publication is atomic — a failed publication leaves all operational records unchanged.
Choose the operational objective first. The workspace will then guide scope preparation and assignment.
Update the site, responsible agent, participants, priority and schedule window for this intervention.
Tasks added to the prepared scope become assignable work during field execution.
Choose what this intervention prepares. It drives the field workflow.
Only a name is required to start a draft — site, assignment and schedule can be completed now or later in the Prepare step.
A name is required to start the draft.
Declare or enrich a site and its hierarchy.
Record work that was not part of the prepared scope. It will be highlighted during review.
Confirm the assignment, schedule and priority. These freeze the scope before agents reach the field.
Explain why this work cannot be completed. The manager will review this reason before publication.
e.g. Equipment inaccessible — locked plant room, no key on site.
A reason is required to skip this work.
Add a task to the prepared scope. Only an action is required — target and assignee can be set now or later during execution.
Optional site, facility or equipment target
Unassigned items can be picked up by any field agent.
Changes are saved offline and waiting to sync.
Intervention not found or unavailable offline.
Remove this prepared work item? This cannot be undone.
Remove these prepared work items? This cannot be undone.
Permanently remove the synchronization operations that the server rejected? This cannot be undone — the discarded work will need to be re-recorded.
Publication failed without applying partial changes.
Planned interventions are prepared for offline use. Open one to continue from the next recommended action.
Planned or in-progress interventions assigned to you will appear here, ready to continue offline.
Work items planned for this intervention, plus any field discoveries, will appear here.
Prepare field data, resolve blockers and publish when the intervention is ready.
Create an intervention when a site visit needs offline-ready facility, equipment and inspection preparation.
Add explicit tasks to make the scope assignable.
Permanently delete and all of its data. This cannot be undone.
Refine asset growth metrics by equipment, facility, period, and comparison mode.
Equipment and facilities created over time
Refine equipment creation metrics by type, status, period, and comparison mode.
Refine facility creation metrics by type, period, and comparison mode.
Inspection throughput versus opened non-conformity pressure
Refine inspection quality metrics by inspection scope, NC severity, period, and comparison mode.
Refine inspection metrics by status, result, inspector type, period, and comparison mode.
Refine opened non-conformity metrics by status, severity, period, and comparison mode.
Refine resolved non-conformity metrics by status, severity, period, and comparison mode.
Inspection throughput and non-conformity pressure over time
Refine the time window and comparison settings for the operational flow chart.
Overlay the previous period on the chart and summary metrics.
Overview of activity trends and key metrics for your organization.
Overview of resource trends and key metrics for your organization.
Your plan stays active until , then reverts to Free.
Your plan will revert to Free at the end of the period.
Cancel at the end of the current period. You keep access until then; no data is deleted.
The organization subscription plan has been updated.
Your subscription will end at the close of the current billing period.
Cancel your subscription at the end of the current period? You keep access until then and no data is deleted.
Your subscription is being activated — it may take a few seconds to appear.
No changes were made to your subscription.
You've reached your current plan's limit for . Upgrade your plan to add more.
Usage data is not available yet.
No organization matches your search. Try different keywords.
Organizations group your facilities, equipment, inspections and team.
This action is permanent. The organization and all of its data will be deleted and cannot be recovered.
Shown in the organization switcher and headers.
We couldn't upload the logo. Please try again.
JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF — 5 MB max.
A name of 2 to 120 characters is required.
Used in URLs and to confirm deletion.
Use lowercase letters, numbers and single dashes (min. 3 characters).
A short summary of the organization.
Inactive organizations are hidden and read-only.
Show real-time notifications inside the application.
A field intervention is finalized and published to the team.
An intervention is assigned to a responsible agent.
A scheduled inspection is approaching or overdue.
An inspection opens a new equipment non-conformity.
A new member is invited to join the organization.
The display language for this organization.
How dates are displayed across the app.
Invitation accepted. You can now open your organizations.
The invitation could not be accepted. It may be expired or revoked.
Accept the invitation to join the organization.
The settings could not be saved.
The organization could not be deleted.
Name, slug, description, logo and active status.
Choose the plan that fits your organization.
Resource consumption against your plan limits.
Timezone, locale, date format and units.
The organization settings have been updated.
The organization logo has been updated.
The organization has been permanently deleted.
Manage members, invitations, roles and permissions.
You've reached your plan's member limit. Upgrade your plan to add more members.
You've reached your plan's member limit. Upgrade your plan to invite more members.
The team administration data could not be loaded.
The team operation could not be completed.
Invoices will appear here once your organization is billed.
Invitations you send will appear here until they are accepted.
People who join this organization will appear here.
Roles you create for this organization will appear here.
The future of fire safety, reimagined.
Monitor, coordinate and secure every site from one control plane designed for incident readiness and operational clarity.
Events scheduled for this month will appear here.
